subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and firm one! Your outspread page was noted and its purpose became clear. Although thou dwellest in seclusion, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت ورق منشور ملحوظ افتاد و مقصود معلوم گردید هر چند گوشه نشینی ولی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
